title: Dark Pattern Detector
description: Check your website for dark patterns — run through this UX ethics checklist before launching
viralHook: Run your app through this dark pattern checklist. Most sites fail 6 out of 15.

items.label: Unsubscribe is easy to find (not hidden in tiny text)
No pre-checked opt-in boxes for newsletters or marketing
Cancellation flow is as easy as signup
No fake urgency ('Only 2 left!' when there's infinite stock)
No countdown timers that reset when the page reloads
Cookie banner has a real 'Reject All' button
Pricing is transparent — no hidden fees at checkout
Free trial doesn't require credit card upfront
No shame-clicking ('No thanks, I don't like saving money')
Delete account option exists and actually works
No bait-and-switch pricing after trial ends
Social proof is real (not fabricated reviews)
Data collection is minimized to what's needed
